summary: Backend-only verification of XSL stylesheet polish for sitemap. All assertions in the review request pass: sitemap.xml is well-formed XML with 35 <url> entries, line 1 is the XML declaration, line 2 is the <?xml-stylesheet?> PI, line 3 starts the urlset. /sitemap.xml, /sitemap.xsl and /api/seo/sitemap.xml all return 200 application/xml on the preview origin. Generator is idempotent (no duplicate PI) and fallback keeps existing file when backend unreachable. Pytest regression unchanged: 107 passed + 2 skipped + 0 failed.

verifications_executed.first_three_lines: PASS — L1 '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>', L2 '<?xml-stylesheet type="text/xsl" href="/sitemap.xsl"?>', L3 '<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">'
verifications_executed.preview_sitemap_xml_http: PASS — 200, Content-Type application/xml, 5741 bytes, contains <?xml-stylesheet, all 35 <loc> begin with https://cardost.in/
verifications_executed.preview_sitemap_xsl_http: PASS — 200, Content-Type application/xml, parses as XML with root {http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform}stylesheet
verifications_executed.backend_dynamic_api_sitemap: PASS — GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml → 200 application/xml; charset=utf-8; line 1 XML decl, line 2 <?xml-stylesheet?> PI, valid XML with 35 URLs
verifications_executed.generator_idempotency: PASS — running generate-sitemap.js twice yields exactly one <?xml-stylesheet PI (count=1 after run2)
verifications_executed.generator_fallback: PASS — REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://does-not-exist.invalid → exit 0, stderr 'keeping existing public/sitemap.xml', file byte-identical to pre-run state (diff empty)
verifications_executed.pytest_regression: PASS — 107 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failed in 31.87s (junit at /app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_11.xml). No SEO test required tweaking.
verifications_executed.robots_txt: PASS — Sitemap directive still 'https://cardost.in/sitemap.xml'; Disallow lines for /admin, /admin/, /checkout, /cart, /my-orders, /order/, /api/ all present

critical_code_review_comments: generate-sitemap.js line 88 regex `^<\?xml[^>]*\?>\n?` correctly anchors to the XML declaration only and prepends the PI after it — safe.
Idempotency guard `if (!/xml-stylesheet/.test(rewritten))` works as designed; a second pass is a no-op.

tests/test_cardost_universal.py requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in os.environ at import time — pytest collection fails without it. Pre-existing collection-time coupling (not introduced this round); main agent may want to read it from /app/frontend/.env or via a dotenv fixture so test runs without manual export. Not a blocker.
test_credentials: admin@cardost.com / Admin@123 (not exercised this round; no auth flow under test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview sitemap currently has 35 URLs (preview DB); production cardost.in has 118 URLs. Generator picks SOURCE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL OR https://cardost.in, so unset env defaults to production. For pytest, export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before running tests/test_cardost_universal.py. iteration_11 polish change (XSL PI) is verified end-to-end on preview; production needs a redeploy to pick it up.
